channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Former Hong Kong publisher Jimmy Lai begins to testify in his national security trial
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Former Hong Kong publisher Jimmy Lai began testifying Wednesday in his landmark national security trial, telling the court about his 2019 meetings with former U.S. Vice President Mike Pence and former U.S.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Texas board advances plan to allow Bible material in elementary school lessons
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas' education board on Tuesday advanced a new Bible-infused curriculum that would be optional for schools to incorporate in kindergarten through fifth grades, one of the latest Republican-led efforts in the U.S. to incorporate more religious teaching into classrooms.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump picks Dr. Oz to run Medicare and Medicaid, Linda McMahon for Education, Lutnick for Commerce
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday tapped billionaire professional wrestling mogul Linda McMahon to be secretary of the Education Department, tasked with overseeing an agency Trump has promised to dismantle. He also selected Dr.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, AMANDA SEITZ, COLLIN BINKLEY and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump to nominate professional wrestling mogul Linda McMahon to be education secretary
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump is nominating the billionaire professional wrestling mogul Linda McMahon to be secretary of the Education Department, tasked with overseeing an agency Trump has promised to dismantle.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN and AMANDA SEITZ Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Reuters hires former Post and AP executive editor Sally Buzbee to lead US, Canada news operation
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sally Buzbee, the former executive editor of The Washington Post and The Associated Press, is joining Reuters as the news agency's top editor for the United States and Canada, the company said Tuesday. As news editor for the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Human smuggling trial witness says he shuttled over 500 Indian migrants into the US
item.description: FERGUS FALLS, Minn. (AP) — A man convicted of human smuggling testified Tuesday that he shuttled more than 500 Indian migrants across the U.S.-Canada border over four years as part of an international smuggling ring that prosecutors said led to the deaths of a family of four.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL GOLDBERG, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Minimum wage isn't going up: California votes against Prop 32
item.description: Californians are projected to vote against a minimum wage boost in the state, giving a "no" to Proposition 32, according to an Associated Press race call on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dom McAndrew, Fox 5

item.title: Mattel releases doll honoring EGOT winner Rita Moreno
item.description: Toy maker Mattel is releasing a doll honoring Emmy, Grammy, Oscar and Tony (EGOT) winner Rita Moreno, a prominent Latina actor.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KRON4

item.title: Italian village offering $1 homes to Americans wanting to relocate after election
item.description: A small rural village in Italy is offering homes for as little as $1.06 after the 2024 presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-Maryland teacher to serve fraction of 30-year sentence after pleading guilty to sex with teen student
item.description: A former Maryland middle school teacher was sentenced to prison on Friday after pleading guilty to having sex with a 14-year-old student dozens of times in 2015.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Survivors of LGBTQ+ club shooting say the deaths and trauma could've been avoided in lawsuits
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Adriana Vance collected herself in front of the cameras, two years to the day after her son was killed in the mass shooting at an LGBTQ+ nightclub in Colorado Springs, a murder that lawsuits allege could have been prevented by law enforcement and the club's owners.
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Few Americans use 'woke' terminology: Survey
item.description: In the YouGov survey, under a quarter of Americans polled said they “regularly use” words and phrases such as “safe space,” “woke,” "lived experience” and “white privilege.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: California governor will not make clemency decision for Menendez brothers until new DA reviews case
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom says he won’t make a clemency decision on the murder convictions of Erik and Lyle Menendez until newly elected Los Angeles County District Attorney Nathan Hochman reviews the case.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: FEMA administrator says she supports investigation of alleged Trump bias in relief efforts
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The head of the Federal Emergency Management Agency told lawmakers Tuesday she has encouraged the agency's inspector general to review whether an employee was acting alone when directing workers helping hurricane victims not to go to homes with yards signs supporting President-elec
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump chooses TV doctor Mehmet Oz to lead Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump says he is nominating Dr. Mehmet Oz, who hosted a long-running television talk show, to lead the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Another rare 'doomsday fish' discovered off Southern California coast for the third time this year
item.description: Another oarfish has made its way from the deep sea to the coast of San Diego County in Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, KTLA 5

item.title: Grassley: Gaetz Ethics report's release would result in 'faster consideration' of nomination
item.description: Sen. Chuck Grassley (Iowa), the incoming Republican chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, said Tuesday that the House Ethics Committee would help speed up the Senate’s consideration of former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) to lead the Justice Department if it releases its report on Gaetz.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nvidia rivals focus on building a different kind of chip to power AI products
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Building the current crop of artificial intelligence chatbots has relied on specialized computer chips pioneered by Nvidia, which dominates the market and made itself the poster child of the AI boom.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Senate report claims Biden failures in protecting migrant children
item.description: GOP Sen. Bill Cassidy launched a formal investigation more than a year ago into unaccompanied migrant kids.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: Tracking the Tropics | 2024 hurricane season nears its end
item.description: With just two weeks left to go in the 2024 hurricane season, the tropics appear to have quieted down.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, Fox 5

item.title: Former 'American Idol' contestant pleads guilty in deadly DUI crash
item.description: Former "American Idol" contestant Caleb Kennedy has pleaded guilty to driving under the influence during a deadly 2022 crash in South Carolina.
item.dc:creator: Robert Cox, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Mississippi restaurant, co-owner sentenced for decades-long fish mislabeling scheme
item.description: GULFPORT, Miss. (WJTV) - A Mississippi corporation operating as Mary Mahoney’s Old French House restaurant in Biloxi, Mississippi, and its co-owner and manager were sentenced on charges for a long-standing conspiracy to misbrand seafood.
item.dc:creator: Sethanie Smith, NewsNation

item.title: Mountain lion rescued from tree outside California home
item.description: First responders rescued a young mountain lion from a tree after he wandered into the yard of an Orange County home on Monday afternoon
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, Fox 5

item.title: Reuters hires former Post and AP executive editor Sally Buzbee to lead US, Canada news operation
item.description: Reuters has hired Sally Buzbee, former executive editor of The Washington Post and The Associated Press, to be its top news editor in the United States and Canada.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 3 killed in series of random stabbings in New York City
item.description: A man is accused of fatally stabbing three people across a swath of Manhattan on Monday morning, carrying out a series of random attacks without uttering a word to his victims, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, KRON4

item.title: Trump watches as Musk’s SpaceX launches Starship rocket
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is expected to attend the launch of a SpaceX rocket in Texas on Tuesday, sources familiar with the plans confirmed, in the latest sign of Trump’s closeness to the company's billionaire CEO Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WGN 9

item.title: 2 hospitalized after California theme park riders stranded mid-air
item.description: Two thrill-seekers were hospitalized Monday after they became stranded for more than two hours on a malfunctioning ride at Knott’s Berry Farm in Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, ABC 4

item.title: Diddy tried to reach out to witnesses from jail, prosecutors allege
item.description: Combs has repeatedly "flouted rules" so he can "improperly impact the outcome of his case," prosecutors said.
item.dc:creator: Kelley Connors, ABC 4

item.title: Trump’s vows for revenge take on new seriousness
item.description: President-elect Trump’s vows to seek revenge have brought a renewed sense of alarm to those who have crossed ways with him now that he’s returning to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Here are the benefits all US presidents get when they retire
item.description: When a president leaves office, the checks and other benefits continue. Here’s a look at some of those perks, and how they came about.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, Fox 5

item.title: Young people, whose futures are at stake in UN climate talks, push through anger to fight for hope
item.description: BAKU, Azerbaijan (AP) — Young people who attend the United Nations climate talks have a lot to be angry about. They've lost loved ones and months of school. They've lost homes and family farms and connections to their families' native lands. They haven't lost hope, though. Not yet.
item.dc:creator: MELINA WALLING, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 3 hurt when plane crashes near Southern California dragstrip hosting racing event
item.description: At least two parked vehicles on the ground were struck when the small plane crashed around near the dragstrip.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: 8-year-old who raised money for mother's headstone now giving back
item.description: Emouree Johnson, 8, ran a lemonade stand earlier this year to raise money for a headstone for her mother. Now, she's raising funds to help other kids.
item.dc:creator: Josiah Elmore, WGN 9

item.title: The worst passwords you could have in 2024 — or any year
item.description: Don't rely on easy-to-remember passwords too much — because all of us tend to think more alike than we'd think.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, Fox 5

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bullet strikes Southwest Airlines flight in Dallas
item.description: The Texas incident comes just days after JetBlue Airways, Spirit Airlines and American Airlines halted flights to Haiti after two aircraft were hit by bullets amid the gang violence escalating in the country.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Transgender-rights advocates say the election of Trump and his allies marks a major setback
item.description: Election victories for Donald Trump and other candidates whose campaigns demeaned transgender people reinforced a widespread backlash against trans rights. For America's LGBTQ-rights movement, it adds up to one of the most sustained setbacks in its history.
item.dc:creator: DAVID CRARY, Associated Press, ABC 4
